_comment: JetBrains ZombieCoder External Tools — SSOT Auto-Generator & Agent Commands
_usage: Import this as External Tools in JetBrains IDEs (Settings > Tools > External Tools)
_feature_ssot: Each tool auto-triggers SSOT creation if missing via the /v1/agent/directory endpoint

tools.name: ZombieCoder: Init SSOT
tools.description: Initialize .zombiecoder/SSOT.md for current project — agent context ready
tools.arguments: -Command "try { $dir = '${ProjectFileDir$}'; if (-not $dir) { $dir = '${ContentRoot$}' }; if (-not $dir) { $dir = '${FileDir$}' }; if (-not $dir) { $dir = Get-Location }; $body = '{\"directory\":\"' + $dir.Replace('\','\\') + '\"}'; $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri 'http://localhost:9999/v1/agent/directory' -Method POST -Body $body -ContentType 'application/json' -TimeoutSec 15 -UseBasicParsing; Write-Output ('SSOT Ready: ' + $r.Content) } catch { Write-Output ('Error: ' + $_.Exception.Message) }"

tools.name: ZombieCoder: Chat with Agent
tools.description: Open ZombieCoder agent chat — auto-uses SSOT context
tools.arguments: -Command "try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri 'http://localhost:9999/v1/agent/chat' -Method POST -Body '{\"model\":\"mimo-v2.5-free\",\"messages\":[{\"role\":\"user\",\"content\":\"Analyze the current project structure and suggest improvements.\"}]}' -ContentType 'application/json' -TimeoutSec 30 -UseBasicParsing; Write-Output $r.Content.Substring(0, [Math]::Min(1000, $r.Content.Length)) } catch { Write-Output $_.Exception.Message }"

tools.name: ZombieCoder: Project Status
tools.description: Check ZombieCoder agent system status — SSOT, RAG, index health
tools.arguments: -Command "try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri 'http://localhost:9999/v1/agent/status' -TimeoutSec 5 -UseBasicParsing; Write-Output $r.Content.Substring(0, [Math]::Min(500, $r.Content.Length)) } catch { Write-Output 'Bridge not running' }"

tools.name: ZombieCoder: Quick SSOT Check
tools.description: Check if SSOT.md exists for current project
tools.arguments: -Command "try { $ssotPath = Join-Path '${ProjectFileDir$}' '.zombiecoder' 'SSOT.md'; if (Test-Path $ssotPath) { Write-Output '✅ SSOT.md exists (' + (Get-Item $ssotPath).Length + ' bytes)' } else { Write-Output '❌ SSOT.md not found — use Init SSOT tool to create' } } catch { Write-Output $_.Exception.Message }"
